A Theurgist's Letter to the Spiral

A Wizard101 Web Shrine

hello and welcome to A Theurgist’s Letter to the Spiral, a web shrine dedicated to Wizard101. Wizard101 is an MMO from 2008 developed and publised by Kingsisle Entertainment! in Wizard101, you get to create a Wizard, picking from one of seven Schools of Magic. with your Wizard, you must go on an adventure to save the Spiral, using spell cards you learn along the way!


Wizard101 is a cherished childhood game to me, and I hope to share just how much I love this game with this small web shrine. it’s combat is unlike any other MMO I’ve played, and it’s story ranges from whimsical and fun, to some of the most emotional writing I’ve ever had the pleasure of reading. (by the way, all dialogue in Wizard101 is voiced!)


I recommend everyone give Wizard101 a go. the free-to-play section lasts until the start of Krokotopia (the second world), which should be enough for you to tell if you enjoy the combat or not. if you listen to the dialogue, that section will take a few hours!

On the Title

A Theurgist’s Letter to the Spiral. A Theurgist, more well known as a Life Wizard, is the School of my main character. I want this web shrine to feel like a love letter to the game of sorts - besides, that’s basically what this is. Think of this as my own character writing back to home.

The Story

The story of Wizard101 is such a fun journey that I always look forward to when I start a new Wizard. To keep things spoiler free, I will only lightly touch on the first arc's story!

The story begins in Wizard City, where you, known as the Wizard, arrive in Golem Court. You are introduced to Merle Ambrose, the headmaster of Ravenwood school of Magical Arts, and his friend, Gamma the owl. you're about to go through initiation - but oh no! suddenly, as a lightning strike hits the tower, you see an evil silhouette through the window... merle instructs you to enter the tower, and once inside, you come face to face with malistaire! he challenges you to a fight - but he wont fight you himself, no, he makes his evil minions fight you instead! (this is where the combat tutorial takes place!)

once you defeat his minions, malistaire flees, and you're left to finish your initation!

from this point, you slowly unravel the story behind the first arc - traevelling from wizard city, to the ancient krokotopia, the rooftops of marleybone, the nature of mooshu, and finally, to dragonspyre - where you face off against mailistaire!

my wizards

Emma DreamDreamer


  • school: life
  • level: 180
  • currently: farming BiS in darkmoor
  • creation date: february 2015

emma dreamdreamer is a wizard that claims to be from marleybone. they are a highly skilled theurgist, known for their ability to heal almost anything! they are an avid gardener who finds joys more in hobbies than saving the world... alas, there's always a healer in need!

while i did have an early childhood account, i've since lost access to it (and honestly, there wasn't anything actually important on it). when i tried out the game again, i made emma, and i got completely hooked on it! i have so many happy memories on this wizard :)

(btw as a kid i thought "dreamdreamer" was hilarious)

Brynn StarCatcher


  • school: ice
  • level: 115
  • currently: questing in mirage
  • creation date: december 2017

a harsh survivalist from the bitter chill of polaris, brynn is on a quest to find out what happened to her sister, calamity. while she acts cold on the outside, brynn herself is actually quite kind-hearted. she travels with the rambunctious tiffany legendthief to discover the secrets of the spiral!

brynn was the first character i created to quest with my (now) girlfriend! we started questing on brynn (ice) and calamity (fire), but my girlfriend since swapped to a myth wizard instead (tiffany)! we thought it'd be fun to weave that into their storylines.

currently on semi-hiatus as we're questing on different wizards right now!

Grace DawnSong


  • school: storm
  • level: 84
  • currently: questing in azteca
  • creation date: unknown, likely 2019 ~ 2020

grace is a punky, rebellious storm wizard from wizard city. she came from a known family of powerful wizards, and grace herself is just as powerful as her bloodline. she's highly intelligent and cunning, and very self-assured, but secretly cares so much about her friends. she would stand up for them in a heartbeat!

grace, for the longest time, was kind of stuck at level 30 with nothing much to do. that was until my girlfriend decided "i wanna play a death wizard!" and that gave me the perfect opportunity to finally play grace! playing as a storm wizard is honestly so much fun, and trying to get the best stats for my level is really engaging!

Roslyn WillowWhisper


  • school: death
  • level: 34
  • currently: waiting for next adventure
  • creation date: unknown, likely 2020 ~ 2021

roslyn is a quiet student of the ravenwood school of magical arts. you can find her almost always in a book, so incredibly curious about what comes after death... but why?

roslyn is currently in limbo - i finished grinding mount olympus on her, but now i'm sort of waiting for an opportunity to play her again! maybe once i'm done grinding for gear on emma, roslyn will have another chance to shine!

also, i grinded for the bone dragon from the lost pages on her! i got quite unlucky, i think getting it almost minutes before the end of the event.

resources, links & extras

things i've made

feel free to use these on your own site!
credit is appreciated, but only so others can find and use them too!

things others have made

  • Spiral Redirectory (big list of wizard101 related links)
  • Sleepverse Fankit (a bunch of wizard101 assets, recreated by scratch in high quality)
  • /r/Wizard101 Gear Guide Spreadsheet (gear spreadsheet, mainly for solo PVE)
  • Wizard101 Guide (another gear spreadsheet)

thanks

thanks for checking out A Theurgist’s Letter to the Spiral! i hope my web shrine conveyed to you just how much i adore this game. if you enjoyed reading this shrine, maybe you should give wizard101 a go?

anyway, thank you again! see you in the spiral.
